title: Two Figure Skaters Joining
body: Two figure skaters are coasting in the same direction, with the leading skater moving at $$5.5$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$ and the trailing skating moving at $$6.2$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$. When the trailing skater catches up with the leading skater, he picks her up without applying any horizontal forces on his skates. The trailing skater is 50% heavier than the 50-kg leading skater.
